overview: Resilient Human Performance is a fitness training facility offering personalized coaching in strength, fitness, athletic development, injury recovery, and nutrition. Services are delivered through 1:1 assessments and semi-private training with access to a multidisciplinary care team.
highlights: Multidisciplinary care team including occupational therapists, chiropractors, and massage therapists
targetAudience: People seeking fitness training, athletic development, injury recovery, or nutrition coaching.
